<div class="col-md-3 article-toc d-none d-md-block">
= Contents =
  - [[#LaTeX插入图片|LaTeX插入图片]]

</div>
<div class="col-md-9 article-main">
%template article_template
=LaTeX插入图片=
{{{latex
\begin{figure}
	\begin{minipage}{\linewidth}
	\centering
	\subfloat[图1]{
	    \begin{minipage}{6.5cm}
	    \centering
	    \includegraphics[width=6.5cm]{img/16}
	    \end{minipage}}
	\subfloat[图2]{
	    \begin{minipage}{6.5cm}
	    \centering
	    \includegraphics[width=6.5cm]{img/16-bode}
	    \end{minipage}}
	\caption{100$\Omega$电阻}
	\label{16}
	\end{minipage}
\end{figure}
}}}
